labels.name: goobers:ready
labels.description: Curated and scoped; eligible for implementation

issues.title: Reject tasks with empty titles
issues.body:
## Problem

`POST /tasks` currently accepts a missing, non-string, or whitespace-only `title`, creating a task that cannot be identified in the list.

## Acceptance criteria

- Return HTTP 400 with `{ "error": "title is required" }` when `title` is missing, is not a string, or contains only whitespace.
- Trim surrounding whitespace before storing a valid title.
- Keep the existing successful response shape and status for valid tasks.
- Add focused tests for invalid and trimmed titles.

## Verification

Run `npm test`.

## Scope

Change only task-creation validation and its tests.

issues.title: Completing a task twice should not reopen it
issues.body:
## Problem

`PATCH /tasks/:id/complete` toggles the completion flag, so retrying the same request reopens an already completed task. Completion requests should be safe to retry.

## Acceptance criteria

- Completing an open task returns HTTP 200 with `completed: true`.
- Completing the same task again also returns HTTP 200 and leaves `completed: true`.
- Preserve the existing HTTP 404 response for an unknown task.
- Add a focused regression test for the repeated request.

## Verification

Run `npm test`.

## Scope

Change only completion behavior and its tests.

issues.title: Filter the task list by completion status
issues.body:
## Problem

`GET /tasks` always returns every task. Add the small filtering feature used by clients that show separate pending and completed views.

## Acceptance criteria

- `GET /tasks?status=pending` returns only tasks with `completed: false`.
- `GET /tasks?status=completed` returns only tasks with `completed: true`.
- `GET /tasks` continues to return every task.
- An unsupported `status` returns HTTP 400 with `{ "error": "invalid status" }`.
- Add focused tests for all four cases.

## Verification

Run `npm test`.

## Scope

Change only task-list filtering and its tests.
